name: LESAKA TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Lesaka Technologies Inc. is a South African fintech company enabling underserviced consumers and businesses across Southern Africa to manage financial activities. It serves over 2 million consumers with banking, credit, insurance, and payout solutions; over 125,000 merchants with payment acceptance and cash management solutions; and over 750 enterprises with proprietary network capabilities for payments. Operating in South Africa, Namibia, Botswana, Zambia, and Kenya, Lesaka offers products across consumer and merchant financial lifecycles through three segments: Merchant, Consumer, and Enterprise.

products.name: Digital Banking App
products.description: Mobile banking application for consumers to manage deposits, spending, and bill payments.

products.name: Merchant Acquiring Solutions
products.description: Card payment acceptance solutions for micro-merchants and small-to-medium merchants.

products.name: Alternative Digital Products (ADP)
products.description: Digital products offered at merchant locations enabling bill payments and digital transactions.

products.name: Cash Management and Digitalization Solutions
products.description: Cash management tools and digital accounts helping merchants track deposits and make supplier payments.

products.name: Small Business Lending (Cash Advances)
products.description: Access to capital for small-to-medium merchants via cash advance products.

products.name: Integrated POS Software and Hardware
products.description: Point-of-sale software and hardware solutions for the hospitality industry.

products.name: Biller Network
products.description: Proprietary network connecting over 620 enterprise service providers to enable bill payment collection.

products.name: Cloud-Connected Cash Vaults
products.description: In-store cash digitization devices enabling merchants to deposit and manage cash digitally.

products.name: ATMs
products.description: ATMs placed in merchant stores to drive foot traffic and enable cash withdrawals for consumers.

products.name: Payments Management Account App
products.description: Digital app for merchants to manage payment accounts and financial services.

products.name: Adumo Platform
products.description: Payment processing and integrated software solutions for approximately 29,000 active merchants across South Africa, Namibia, Botswana, and Kenya.

products.name: Recharger Prepaid Electricity Platform
products.description: Submetering administration and payment processing for over 500,000 registered prepaid electricity meters in South Africa.

products.name: Consumer Insurance Solutions
products.description: Insurance products offered to consumers as part of the financial lifecycle suite.

products.name: Government Grant Payout Solutions
products.description: Payment solutions enabling consumers to receive South African government welfare grant disbursements.
